title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally with a simple CLI and REST API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama—chat, generate, embed, pull, and list models from Node or the browser.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama—chat, generate, embed, pull, and list models with a few lines of code.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that wraps Ollama for chat, generation, and embeddings inside LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style) with multi-model chat, file uploads, RAG, and admin panel.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive CLI wrapper with chat history, syntax highlighting, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot’s slot for inline suggestions and chat.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Lightweight RAG template using Ollama + Sentence-Transformers + Chroma to chat with your documents offline.

title: ollama-node
summary: Zero-dependency Node.js client for Ollama with ESM/CJS support and typed promises.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling and PVC model cache.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images (CPU & GPU) with multi-arch support and one-line run commands.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama supporting Kotlin, Scala, and Android via OkHttp.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing async/await bindings to Ollama’s REST API with serde types.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with Unity and Blazor samples; supports streaming and embeddings.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts on selected notes or vault queries via Ollama.

title: ollama-ray
summary: Ray Serve example deploying Ollama models for scalable inference across a cluster.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot bringing local Ollama models to servers with slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command for private or channel-wide LLM chats.

title: ollama-models
summary: Official registry of Modelfile definitions for Llama 3, Phi-3, Mistral, Gemma, CodeLlama, etc.
